compartment.title: Activate caveman mode and remove AnimeLatinoHD provider
compartment.p1:
User activated "ultra" caveman mode for terse, technical responses. Conducted deep dive to identify all logic related to `AnimeLatinoHD` (ALHD) provider for complete removal.
Identified and executed removal across multiple layers: - **Config/DI:** Removed `ANIMELATINO_CONFIG` from `src/lib/config/providerConfigs.ts` and wiped ALHD-specific imports/instantiations from `src/lib/di.ts`. - **Infrastructure:** Generalized `src/lib/core/infrastructure.ts` (`refreshSession`) and `src/lib/infrastructure/services/WebViewBridge.ts` to remove ALHD hardcoding. Parametrized `src/lib/infrastructure/components/WebViewWorker.tsx` to use `about:blank` as initial source. - **Parsers:** Deleted ALHD-specific HTML and RSC parsers: `src/lib/infrastructure/parsers/HtmlParser.ts`, `src/lib/infrastructure/parsers/RscParser.ts`, `src/lib/infrastructure/parsers/AnimeOrchestrator.ts`, `src/lib/infrastructure/parsers/strategies/BaseParser.ts`, and `src/lib/infrastructure/parsers/strategies/HomeParser.ts`. - **WebView/UI:** Cleaned `src/lib/infrastructure/webview/bootstrap.js` by removing ALHD-specific AES-GCM decryption and custom router. Removed Delta server filter from `src/components/AnimeEpisodeModal.tsx`. - **Cleanup:** Updated `.gitignore`, `AGENTS.md`, and `README.md`.
App now boots without a provider; `getProvider()` throws an error until a new one is registered. The architecture is now a "shell" ready for the next provider. Commit 7f9c6fc.
compartment.p2: Activated ultra caveman mode. Identified and removed all AnimeLatinoHD (ALHD) specific logic to leave a generic provider shell. Removed ALHD config, provider, parsers (HTML/RSC), DI wiring, and WebView bootstrap decryption. Generalized infrastructure (WebViewBridge, WebViewWorker, infrastructure.ts) and cleaned up UI (AnimeEpisodeModal Delta filter) and docs. App now boots with a generic provider registry, ready for next implementation. Commit 7f9c6fc.
compartment.p3: Removed AnimeLatinoHD provider and all associated specific logic (parsers, config, DI, WebView decryption) to create a generic provider shell. App now supports registering new `IContentProvider` implementations. Commit 7f9c6fc.
compartment.p4: Removed AnimeLatinoHD provider; created generic provider shell; commit 7f9c6fc

compartment.title: Analyze Katanime repo for new provider integration
compartment.p1:
Investigated the `anime-extensions` repository (cloned to `/tmp/katanime`) to plan the integration of `Katanime` as the new provider.
**Key differences from ALHD:** - **Auth/Session:** Katanime uses direct HTTP instead of WebView-based session washing/cookie management. No Cloudflare/anti-bot bypass via WebView needed. - **Encryption:** Uses AES-CBC with a salt (JS-based) instead of ALHD's AES-GCM. - **Parsing:** Uses direct HTML and POST JSON pagination. - **Video:** Supports servers like VidGuard, StreamWish, Filemoon, and DoodStream.
**Data Mapping to existing App State:** - **Home/Search:** Maps to `GET /animes` and `GET /buscar` endpoints (title, image, URL). - **Details:** Maps to `GET /slug` (title, synopsis, genres, status, poster, episodes). - **Episodes:** Extracted via POST to pagination URL (JSON: number, created_at, url). - **Video Servers:** Extracted from `[data-player]` elements in episode HTML. - **Stream URL:** Requires AES-CBC decryption of script variables and specific server extraction.
U: "podriamos dejar el tema de reproduccion una vez hayamos poblado la app no?"
Plan: Focus on populating the app (Home, Search, Details, Episodes) first, deferring complex video stream resolution/decryption to a later phase.
compartment.p2: Analyzed `katanime` repo in `/tmp/katanime` for integration. Katanime uses direct HTTP and AES-CBC (JS) instead of WebView/AES-GCM. Mapped Katanime endpoints to app requirements: Home/Search (GET), Details (GET), and Episodes (POST JSON pagination). Stream URL resolution requires AES-CBC decryption of player scripts. U: "podriamos dejar el tema de reproduccion una vez hayamos poblado la app no?" -> Decided to prioritize content population (Home, Search, Details, Episodes) before implementing video playback/decryption.
compartment.p3: Analyzed Katanime for replacement of ALHD. Katanime uses direct HTTP and AES-CBC. Mapped its endpoints to Home, Search, Details, and Episode data. Plan is to implement content population first and defer video stream resolution.
compartment.p4: Katanime analysis; direct HTTP + AES-CBC; priority: content population over video playback

facts.PROJECT_RULES: * The app architecture is designed as a generic shell using `IContentProvider` and `AbstractProvider` to allow swapping providers without changing core application services (animeService, playerService).
facts.ARCHITECTURE: * The provider system relies on a `providerRegistry` (singleton) that manages the active `IContentProvider`.
facts.CONFIG_VALUES: * Katanime stream resolution requires AES-CBC decryption (password: "hanabi") of player scripts.
